prompt: Create a cinematic vertical wallpaper scene in a quiet vintage hotel room beside a railway station, warm golden-hour sunlight streaming through a huge window. A young East Asian man with tousled dark hair, wearing a loose white button-up shirt and dark trousers, sits on the floor leaning against the side of an unmade bed, legs stretched out, looking contemplatively toward the window; an open book lies near his hand on the patterned rug. Outside the window, show exactly one long silver passenger train passing left to right on multiple tracks, with utility poles, misty hills, and hazy morning light in the distance. Inside the room include exactly two main furniture pieces: an unmade bed on the left with beige wrinkled sheets and an old sofa on the right with pillows and a draped coat or bag; also include a low foreground table with a dark mug, a vintage suitcase on the floor at bottom right, a small bedside clock on the left cabinet, a framed picture on the wall, a tall narrow vase with dried branches on the windowsill, a small table lamp on the right side of the windowsill, a drinking glass, and a sheer cream curtain hanging over the left part of the window. Use muted sepia and olive-brown tones, dusty air, soft volumetric sunlight, realistic film photography, shallow shadows, nostalgic Wong Kar-wai inspired mood, highly detailed textures, 4:5 vertical composition, no visible text, no watermark. Key customizable details: young adult, loose white button-up shirt and dark trousers, golden-hour morning, one long silver passenger train, quiet nostalgic melancholy.
